task.title: Create Component Styles
task.description: Add CSS styles for UI components in static/css/components/ directory.
constraints: Only create files in static/css/components/ directory
Do not modify files in other directories

steps.thought: Let me check the CSS components directory.
steps.observation:
drwxr-xr-x 2 user user 4096 Dec  6 21:15 .
drwxr-xr-x 4 user user 4096 Dec  6 21:10 ..

steps.thought: I'll create comprehensive component styles within this directory.
Now I'll create card component styles.
Let me create form component styles.
Let me create a component index file and a README.
Let me create documentation for these components.

arguments.content:
# UI Component Styles CSS styles for reusable UI components. ## Usage Import all component styles: ```html ``` Or import individual components: ```html ``` ## Components ### Buttons (buttons.css) ```html ``` ### Cards (cards.css) ```html
Card Title
Card content goes here.
Card footer
``` ### Forms (forms.css) ```html
We'll never share your email.
``` ## Icons Components use CSS-only icons (gradients, shapes) for maximum compatibility. No external icon dependencies required. For custom icons, add SVG files to `static/assets/icons/` and reference in your HTML.
